> Pronto — gerei os undos filtrados e validei com -WhatIf.

  - Criado: D:\reports\fuzzy_retry_undo_only_ok.ps1
  - Criado: D:\reports\fuzzy_retry_undo_only_ok_whatif.ps1
  - Dry-run: executei o ..._whatif.ps1 sem erros (sem alterações reais). Se não houve saída, é provável que não haja
  linhas OK no report ou o conjunto seja pequeno.

  O que fazer agora

  - Conferir contagem: Import-Csv 'D:\reports\fuzzy_retry_report.csv' | Group-Object Result | Sort-Object Count
  -Descending | Format-Table Name,Count -AutoSize
  - Revisar o what-if: pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File D:\reports\fuzzy_retry_undo_only_ok_whatif.ps1
  - Aplicar undo real (como Admin): Start-Process pwsh -Verb RunAs -ArgumentList
  '-NoProfile','-ExecutionPolicy','Bypass','-File','D:\reports\fuzzy_retry_undo_only_ok.ps1'

  Quer que eu rode o what-if novamente com captura de saída resumida ou prossiga com o undo real para um subconjunto
  (ex.: primeiras 10 linhas) como teste?"

---

### ASSISTENTE

Perfeito — você já tem os undos gerados e o *what-if* rodado. Minha recomendação segura (ordem de passos) e os comandos prontos abaixo — escolha uma das opções e copie/cole no seu PowerShell:

Resumo recomendado
1. Re-rodar o **WhatIf** e salvar saída (captura) — confirmar que as ações são as esperadas.  
2. Fazer um **teste real** com as primeiras N linhas (ex.: N=10) — executar elevated.  
3. Se tudo certo, executar o **undo real completo** elevated.  
4. Se quiser, posso gerar um comando único para cada etapa.

### 1) Re-rodar *WhatIf* e salvar saída (captura)
Isso não faz alterações — apenas mostra o que ocorreria. Salva log em `D:\reports\whatif_output.txt`.
```powershell
# roda what-if e grava saída
pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "D:\reports\fuzzy_retry_undo_only_ok_whatif.ps1" *>&1 | Tee-Object "D:\reports\whatif_output.txt"

# mostrar resumo simples
Get-Content "D:\reports\whatif_output.txt" | Select-Object -First 200
# contar linhas de Move-Item no whatif
(Get-Content "D:\reports\fuzzy_retry_undo_only_ok_whatif.ps1" | Where-Object { $_ -match 'Move-Item -WhatIf' } | Measure-Object).Lines
```

### 2) Inspecionar/preview do undo real (primeiras linhas)
Verifique manualmente algumas linhas do `fuzzy_retry_undo_only_ok.ps1`.
```powershell
# ver primeiras 60 linhas
Get-Content "D:\reports\fuzzy_retry_undo_only_ok.ps1" -TotalCount 60

# ver quantas linhas Move-Item existem
(Get-Content "D:\reports\fuzzy_retry_undo_only_ok.ps1" | Where-Object { $_ -match 'Move-Item' } | Measure-Object).Lines
```

### 3) Criar um *test* undo com as primeiras N linhas (N = 10 por exemplo)
Cria `fuzzy_retry_undo_only_ok_test10.ps1` com as 10 primeiras ações e gera um what-if para esse arquivo também.
```powershell
$N = 10
$srcFile = "D:\reports\fuzzy_retry_undo_only_ok.ps1"
$testFile = "D:\reports\fuzzy_retry_undo_only_ok_test${N}.ps1"
$testWhatIf = "D:\reports\fuzzy_retry_undo_only_ok_test${N}_whatif.ps1"

Get-Content $srcFile | Select-Object -First $N | Set-Content $testFile -Encoding UTF8
Get-Content $testFile | ForEach-Object { $_ -replace '\bMove-Item\b','Move-Item -WhatIf' } | Set-Content $testWhatIf -Encoding UTF8

# Dry-run the small whatif and capture
pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File $testWhatIf *>&1 | Tee-Object "D:\reports\whatif_test${N}_output.txt"
Get-Content "D:\reports\whatif_test${N}_output.txt"
```

### 4) Fazer backup dos destinos do teste (forte recomendação)
Copia os arquivos de destino do teste para uma pasta de backup antes de executar o undo real de teste.
```powershell
$backupFolder = "D:\reports\backup_test10"
New-Item -Path $backupFolder -ItemType Directory -Force | Out-Null

# extrair destinos do test file (assume padrão if (Test-Path "DST") { Move-Item ... })
(Get-Content $testFile) | ForEach-Object {
  if ($_ -match 'Test-Path `?"(?<dst>.+?)`?"\)') { $dst = $Matches['dst']; 
    if (Test-Path $dst) { Copy-Item -LiteralPath $dst -Destination $backupFolder -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }
  }
}
Write-Host "Backup (attempt) finished into $backupFolder"
```
(Se os destinos são muitos/complexos, adapte a cópia para pastas inteiras.)

### 5) Executar o **undo real** para o teste (elevated)
Executar o teste real com elevação (vai mover de volta os primeiros N itens). **Revise o backup e o what-if antes.**
```powershell
Start-Process pwsh -Verb RunAs -ArgumentList '-NoProfile','-ExecutionPolicy','Bypass','-File','D:\reports\fuzzy_retry_undo_only_ok_test10.ps1'
```

### 6) Executar o **undo real completo** (quando pronto)
Se o teste for OK e você confia, rode o undo completo como Administrador:
```powershell
Start-Process pwsh -Verb RunAs -ArgumentList '-NoProfile','-ExecutionPolicy','Bypass','-File','D:\reports\fuzzy_retry_undo_only_ok.ps1'
```

---

### Comandos rápidos para relatórios/checks
Contar OK/FAILED/NOTFOUND no report:
```powershell
Import-Csv 'D:\reports\fuzzy_retry_report.csv' | Group-Object Result | Sort-Object Count -Descending | Format-Table Name,Count -AutoSize
```
Listar primeiras falhas:
```powershell
Import-Csv 'D:\reports\fuzzy_retry_report.csv' | Where-Object { $_.Result -like 'FAILED*' -or $_.Result -eq 'NOTFOUND' } | Select-Object -First 50 | Format-Table -AutoSize
```

---

Quer que eu:
A) Recrie aqui exato o comando para gerar o teste N=10 (já dei acima — quer que eu gere para outro N?),  
B) Rerun o *what-if* agora e capturar saída resumida pra você (eu mostro o one-liner para colar), ou  
C) Forneça o único comando pronto para executar o undo real (elevado) para todo o arquivo?

Escolha A, B ou C (ou diga outro N para o teste).

---

### USUÁRIO

quero que que forneça o sop teia para o codex concluir todas as pendências em uma rodada só

---

### ASSISTENTE

Perfeito — abaixo está um **SOP (Standard Operating Procedure) “Teia”** objetivo e um **script orquestrador** pronto para o *codex* (ou para executar via pwsh) que tenta resolver **todas as pendências** em uma rodada só, com etapas de segurança (dry-runs, backups, testes de pequena amostra) e opções para operações que exigem Admin (takeown/icacls, undo real).

**Leitura rápida:** salve o script em `D:\reports\run_codex_full_round.ps1` e execute com `codex run D:\reports\run_codex_full_round.ps1` **ou** `pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File D:\reports\run_codex_full_round.ps1` (veja opções de linha de comando no header do script).  

---

# SOP Teia — objetivos e sequência
1. Fazer **backup** dos arquivos de mapping/logs (já incluído no script).  
2. Rodar o **retry** (script `codex_retry_errors.ps1`) em modo dry-run primeiro ou em real-run conforme flag.  
3. Gerar relatório `fuzzy_retry_report.csv` e `fuzzy_retry_verbose.log`.  
4. Gerar **undo** filtrado apenas para itens com `OK` e um **WhatIf** do undo e executá-lo (validação).  
5. Fazer teste real do undo para as primeiras N linhas (N configurável) — com backup dos destinos antes de mover.  
6. Se o teste for OK, executar o **undo real completo** (elevado).  
7. Se houver muitos `UnauthorizedAccessException`, reexecutar retry com `-TakeOwnership` (requer Administrator).  
8. Registrar tudo em logs em `D:\reports` e verificar `sample_protected_candidates_present.csv` antes de operações definitivas.  

---

# Script orquestrador (salve como `D:\reports\run_codex_full_round.ps1`)
> Este script chama os artefatos que você já tem (`codex_retry_errors.ps1`, `gen_undo_ok.ps1`, `fuzzy_retry_undo_only_ok.ps1`/`_whatif`, etc.). Possui flags para controlar comportamento. **Leia comentários no topo** antes de rodar.

```powershell
<#
.SYNOPSIS
  Orquestra execução única das pendências "Teia" (retry, undo whatif, test undo, undo real).
.DESCRIPTION
  Usage examples:
    # Dry-run orchestration (no ownership changes, no real undo):
    pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "D:\reports\run_codex_full_round.ps1"

    # Full attempt to fix (retry real) but do NOT run the final undo automatically:
    pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "D:\reports\run_codex_full_round.ps1" -DoRetryReal

    # Run retry + attempt ACL fix on Unauthorized (REQUIRES admin):
    pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "D:\reports\run_codex_full_round.ps1" -DoRetryReal -TakeOwnership

    # Run everything including final undo real (DANGEROUS, REQUIRES admin):
    pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "D:\reports\run_codex_full_round.ps1" -DoRetryReal -TakeOwnership -DoUndoReal

.PARAMETER TakeOwnership
  If specified, when encountering UnauthorizedAccess exceptions the script will ask/attempt to take ownership (requires elevation).
.PARAMETER DoRetryReal
  Run the retry script in real mode (not only dryrun).
.PARAMETER DoUndoReal
  If set, the script will attempt to execute the full undo (must be elevated).
.PARAMETER TestN
  Number of lines to test when performing a small-sample undo (default 10).
#>

param(
  [switch]$TakeOwnership,
  [switch]$DoRetryReal,
  [switch]$DoUndoReal,
  [int]$TestN = 10
)

Set-StrictMode -Version Latest
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'

# Paths
$reportsDir = 'D:\reports'
$retryScript = Join-Path $reportsDir 'codex_retry_errors.ps1'
$retryReport = Join-Path $reportsDir 'fuzzy_retry_report.csv'
$retryVerbose = Join-Path $reportsDir 'fuzzy_retry_verbose.log'
$retryUndo = Join-Path $reportsDir 'fuzzy_retry_undo.ps1'
$undoOk = Join-Path $reportsDir 'fuzzy_retry_undo_only_ok.ps1'
$undoOkWhatIf = Join-Path $reportsDir 'fuzzy_retry_undo_only_ok_whatif.ps1'
$genUndoScript = Join-Path $reportsDir 'gen_undo_ok.ps1'
$errorsCsv = Join-Path $reportsDir 'fuzzy_errors_present.csv'
$backupFolder = Join-Path $reportsDir ("backup_before_run_" + (Get-Date -Format "yyyyMMdd_HHmmss"))

function Assert-File($p) {
  if (-not (Test-Path $p)) { Write-Error "Required file not found: $p"; exit 1 }
}

# 0) Check prerequisites
Write-Host "`n[STEP 0] Checking required artifacts in $reportsDir..."
$required = @($retryScript, $genUndoScript, $errorsCsv)
foreach ($r in $required) { Assert-File $r }
New-Item -Path $backupFolder -ItemType Directory -Force | Out-Null
Write-Host "Backup folder: $backupFolder"

# 1) Backup critical artifacts (non-destructive)
Write-Host "`n[STEP 1] Backing up mapping & report files (safe copy)..."
Get-ChildItem $reportsDir -Filter 'fuzzy_*.csv' -File | ForEach-Object {
  Copy-Item -LiteralPath $_.FullName -Destination $backupFolder -Force
}
Get-ChildItem $reportsDir -Filter 'fuzzy_*.ps1' -File | ForEach-Object {
  Copy-Item -LiteralPath $_.FullName -Destination $backupFolder -Force
}
Write-Host "Backups created."

# 2) Run retry script (dry-run by default; real if -DoRetryReal)
Write-Host "`n[STEP 2] Running retry script (dry-run unless -DoRetryReal)..."
$retryArgs = @()
if ($TakeOwnership) { $retryArgs += '-TakeOwnership' }
if ($DoRetryReal) { $retryArgs += '-RunReal' } # note: your codex_retry_errors.ps1 expects -TakeOwnership only; ensure it supports real flag. If not, edit accordingly.
# prefer invoking with pwsh to capture output
$cmd = "pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File `"$retryScript`""
if ($TakeOwnership) { $cmd += " -TakeOwnership" }
if ($DoRetryReal)  { $cmd += " " } # placeholder if your retry script supports a real flag; otherwise it's controlled inside that script.
Write-Host "Executing: $cmd"
Invoke-Expression $cmd

Write-Host "Retry script finished. Report: $retryReport ; Verbose log: $retryVerbose"

# 3) Generate undo-only-OK and WhatIf (using gen_undo_ok.ps1)
Write-Host "`n[STEP 3] Generating filtered undo (only OK results) and WhatIf..."
Assert-File $genUndoScript
pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File $genUndoScript
if (-not (Test-Path $undoOk) -or -not (Test-Path $undoOkWhatIf)) {
  Write-Error "Undo generation failed: missing $undoOk or $undoOkWhatIf"
  exit 1
}
Write-Host "Undo (OK) scripts: $undoOk and $undoOkWhatIf"

# 4) Run WhatIf for full undo-only-OK (safe validation)
Write-Host "`n[STEP 4] Running WhatIf (dry-run) of undo-only-OK..."
pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File $undoOkWhatIf *>&1 | Tee-Object (Join-Path $reportsDir 'whatif_undo_only_ok_output.txt')
Write-Host "WhatIf complete. See whatif_undo_only_ok_output.txt"

# 5) Create small test undo file (first $TestN lines) and whatif, then dry-run it
Write-Host "`n[STEP 5] Preparing test undo with first $TestN lines..."
$testFile = Join-Path $reportsDir "fuzzy_retry_undo_only_ok_test${TestN}.ps1"
$testWhatIf = Join-Path $reportsDir "fuzzy_retry_undo_only_ok_test${TestN}_whatif.ps1"
(Get-Content $undoOk) | Select-Object -First $TestN | Set-Content $testFile -Encoding UTF8
(Get-Content $testFile) | ForEach-Object { $_ -replace '\bMove-Item\b','Move-Item -WhatIf' } | Set-Content $testWhatIf -Encoding UTF8
pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File $testWhatIf *>&1 | Tee-Object (Join-Path $reportsDir "whatif_test${TestN}_output.txt")
Write-Host "Test whatif saved to whatif_test${TestN}_output.txt"

# 6) Backup destinations of the test items (best-effort)
Write-Host "`n[STEP 6] Attempting to backup existing destination files for test items..."
$testBackup = Join-Path $backupFolder ("testbackup_" + (Get-Date -Format "yyyyMMdd_HHmmss"))
New-Item -Path $testBackup -ItemType Directory -Force | Out-Null
(Get-Content $testFile) | ForEach-Object {
  if ($_ -match 'Test-Path `?"(?<dst>.+?)`?"') {
    $dst = $Matches['dst']
    if (Test-Path $dst) {
      try { Copy-Item -LiteralPath $dst -Destination $testBackup -Force -ErrorAction Stop } catch { Write-Warning "Backup of $dst failed: $($_.Exception.Message)" }
    }
  }
}
Write-Host "Test destination backup attempted to $testBackup"

# 7) Optionally run the small test undo real (requires elevation)
if ($DoUndoReal) {
  Write-Host "`n[STEP 7] Running test undo real (first $TestN) -- will request elevation. Confirm the what-if and backups before continuing." -ForegroundColor Yellow
  Start-Process pwsh -Verb RunAs -ArgumentList '-NoProfile','-ExecutionPolicy','Bypass','-File', $testFile
  Write-Host "Started elevated process for test undo. Monitor results and logs in $reportsDir"
} else {
  Write-Host "`n[STEP 7] (Skipped) To run a test undo real, re-run with -DoUndoReal."
}

# 8) If the user wants a full undo real and script flagged DoUndoReal, run it (requires elevation)
if ($DoUndoReal -and $Host.UI.RawUI.KeyAvailable -eq $false) {
  # if we've already started test undo above, user might prefer to proceed manually; we prompt here (non-blocking if called interactively)
  Write-Host "`n[STEP 8] If you want to run full undo real now, run this command (elevated):" -ForegroundColor Cyan
  Write-Host "Start-Process pwsh -Verb RunAs -ArgumentList '-NoProfile','-ExecutionPolicy','Bypass','-File','$undoOk'"
}

Write-Host "`nOrquestração concluída. Resumo de artefatos gerados:"
Get-ChildItem $reportsDir -Filter 'fuzzy_*' | Select-Object Name,Length,LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize

Write-Host "`nLogs/outputs to inspect:"
Write-Host " - Retry report: $retryReport"
Write-Host " - Retry verbose: $retryVerbose"
Write-Host " - Undo (OK): $undoOk"
Write-Host " - Undo (OK) WhatIf: $undoOkWhatIf"
Write-Host " - Test whatif: $(Join-Path $reportsDir 'whatif_test' + $TestN + '_output.txt')"
Write-Host " - Backup folder: $backupFolder"

# End
```

---

# Instruções de execução (resumo curto)
1. Salve o script acima em `D:\reports\run_codex_full_round.ps1`.  
2. Se quiser que *codex* execute:  
   `codex run D:\reports\run_codex_full_round.ps1`  
   (ou, diretamente com PowerShell)  
   `pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File D:\reports\run_codex_full_round.ps1`  
3. Para habilitar tentativas de takeown/icacls (requer Admin):  
   `pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File D:\reports\run_codex_full_round.ps1 -DoRetryReal -TakeOwnership`  
4. Para rodar também o undo real de teste e do conjunto (com elevação): adicione `-DoUndoReal` e confirme interações elevadas.  
5. Verifique os relatórios em `D:\reports` (especialmente `fuzzy_retry_report.csv` e `fuzzy_retry_verbose.log`) antes de executar qualquer undo real completo.

---

# Riscos e recomendações (importante)
- **Operações de move/copy são destrutivas**: sempre valide **WhatIf** e backups antes do undo real.  
- **TakeOwnership/icacls** pode alterar ACLs e proprietários do sistema; use somente se entender o impacto e com elevação.  
- Scripts de undo movem arquivos de volta se destino existir — revise `undo` gerado antes de executar.  
- Se tiver dúvidas sobre um subconjunto grande, execute o teste com `-TestN 10` (ou outro N menor) primeiro.  
- Mantenha o backup externo (disco ou snapshot) se possível antes de grandes operações.

---

Quer que eu:
- A) gere o arquivo `D:\reports\run_codex_full_round.ps1` aqui (conteúdo já acima — você copia/cola), **ou**
- B) forneça um comando único pronto para colar que execute tudo em modo seguro (apenas dryruns / whatif), **ou**
- C) gere um único comando `codex run ...` que execute com `-DoRetryReal -TakeOwnership -DoUndoReal` (aviso: perigoso — precisa Admin)?

Diga A, B ou C (ou indique ajuste no TestN). Vou entregar o texto exato para copiar/colar conforme sua escolha.

---

### USUÁRIO

quero que você autocontenha ao ponto n

---

### USUÁRIO

quero que você autocontenha ao ponto de não ter mais recomendações de adição significando a completude

---

### ASSISTENTE

Perfeito — abaixo está **o script PowerShell completo e autocontido** que faz *tudo* numa rodada só: lê `D:\reports\fuzzy_errors_present.csv`, tenta retry (dry-run por padrão, ou real com `-DoRetryReal`), tenta correções de propriedade/ACL quando solicitado (`-TakeOwnership` — requer elevação), gera relatórios/undos (undo completo, undo-only-OK e versão -WhatIf), executa what-if do undo, testa um pequeno undo real (opcional) e pode executar o undo real completo (se você pedir `-DoUndoReal` e estiver elevado).  

Este arquivo foi escrito para ser **autossuficiente** — não depende de outros .ps1 existentes.

> Salve como `D:\reports\run_codex_full_round.ps1` e execute com pwsh conforme exemplos no topo do script.

```powershell
<#
.SYNOPSIS
  Run one full "Teia" maintenance round: retry failed moves/copies, attempt ACL fixes, generate undo scripts,
  validate via WhatIf, test a small undo, and optionally run the full undo.

.DESCRIPTION
  Self-contained script that:
    - Reads D:\reports\fuzzy_errors_present.csv (columns: Source,Destination,Action)
    - Tries Move/Copy for each row (dry-run by default)
    - On UnauthorizedAccessException can try takeown/icacls (if -TakeOwnership and running elevated)
    - Produces:
        D:\reports\fuzzy_retry_report.csv         (summary: Source,Destination,Action,Result,Error)
        D:\reports\fuzzy_retry_verbose.log        (detailed trace)
        D:\reports\fuzzy_retry_undo.ps1           (undo for every successful item)
        D:\reports\fuzzy_retry_undo_only_ok.ps1   (undo only for OK results)
        D:\reports\fuzzy_retry_undo_only_ok_whatif.ps1 (undo only OK but with -WhatIf)
        D:\reports\whatif_undo_only_ok_output.txt  (whatif output)
        D:\reports\whatif_testN_output.txt         (test whatif output)
        backup folder with copies before running test undo
  Use with caution. Default is safe (no destructive changes).
.USAGE
  # Dry-run (safe):
  pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "D:\reports\run_codex_full_round.ps1"

  # Full retry (attempt actual Move/Copy), but DO NOT run undo real:
  pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "D:\reports\run_codex_full_round.ps1" -DoRetryReal

  # Retry + attempt takeown/icacls on Unauthorized (REQUIRES elevation):
  pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "D:\reports\run_codex_full_round.ps1" -DoRetryReal -TakeOwnership

  # Do everything including running test undo real and full undo real (DANGEROUS; requires elevation):
  pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "D:\reports\run_codex_full_round.ps1" -DoRetryReal -TakeOwnership -DoUndoReal -TestN 10

.PARAMETER TakeOwnership
  Attempt takeown/icacls on UnauthorizedAccessException (requires Administrator).

.PARAMETER DoRetryReal
  Perform real Move/Copy operations (not only dry-run).

.PARAMETER DoUndoReal
  If set, run test undo real and then the full undo real (requires elevation).

.PARAMETER TestN
  Number of lines to test for the small undo (default 10).

#>

param(
  [switch]$TakeOwnership,
  [switch]$DoRetryReal,
  [switch]$DoUndoReal,
  [int]$TestN = 10
)

Set-StrictMode -Version Latest
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Continue'

# Paths
$reportsDir = 'D:\reports'
$inputCsv = Join-Path $reportsDir 'fuzzy_errors_present.csv'
$reportCsv = Join-Path $reportsDir 'fuzzy_retry_report.csv'
$verboseLog = Join-Path $reportsDir 'fuzzy_retry_verbose.log'
$undoPs1 = Join-Path $reportsDir 'fuzzy_retry_undo.ps1'
$undoOnlyOk = Join-Path $reportsDir 'fuzzy_retry_undo_only_ok.ps1'
$undoOnlyOkWhatIf = Join-Path $reportsDir 'fuzzy_retry_undo_only_ok_whatif.ps1'
$whatifOutput = Join-Path $reportsDir 'whatif_undo_only_ok_output.txt'
$testWhatIfOutput = Join-Path $reportsDir ("whatif_test${TestN}_output.txt")
$backupRoot = Join-Path $reportsDir ("backup_before_run_" + (Get-Date -Format "yyyyMMdd_HHmmss"))

# Helper: assert files exist
function Assert-File([string]$p) {
  if (-not (Test-Path $p)) {
    Write-Error "Required file not found: $p"
    exit 1
  }
}

# Helper: admin check
function Assert-Admin {
  $isAdmin = ([Security.Principal.WindowsPrincipal] [Security.Principal.WindowsIdentity]::GetCurrent()).IsInRole(
    [Security.Principal.WindowsBuiltInRole]::Administrator)
  if (-not $isAdmin) {
    Write-Host "Script not running elevated." -ForegroundColor Yellow
    if ($TakeOwnership -or $DoUndoReal) {
      Write-Error "This operation requires Administrator. Re-run elevated (Run as Administrator)."
      exit 1
    }
  }
}

# Helper: takeown + icacls best-effort
function Try-TakeOwnershipAndGrant([string]$Path) {
  try {
    Write-Host "Attempting takeown/icacls for: $Path"
    # take ownership (force)
    & takeown.exe /F $Path /A /R 2>&1 | Out-Null
    # grant Administrators full control recursively
    & icacls.exe $Path /grant Administrators:F /T 2>&1 | Out-Null
    Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 300
    return $true
  } catch {
    Write-Host "takeown/icacls failed: $($_.Exception.Message)" -ForegroundColor Red
    return $false
  }
}

# Validate inputs
if (-not (Test-Path $inputCsv)) {
  Write-Error "Input CSV not found: $inputCsv  — nothing to retry."
  exit 1
}

if ($TakeOwnership) { Assert-Admin }

# Initialize outputs (overwrite)
if (Test-Path $reportCsv) { Remove-Item $reportCsv -Force }
if (Test-Path $verboseLog) { Remove-Item $verboseLog -Force }
if (Test-Path $undoPs1) { Remove-Item $undoPs1 -Force }
if (Test-Path $undoOnlyOk) { Remove-Item $undoOnlyOk -Force }
if (Test-Path $undoOnlyOkWhatIf) { Remove-Item $undoOnlyOkWhatIf -Force }
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $backupRoot -Force | Out-Null

"Started: $(Get-Date)" | Out-File $verboseLog -Encoding UTF8
"Source,Destination,Action,Result,Error" | Out-File $reportCsv -Encoding UTF8
"## Undo generated: $(Get-Date)" | Out-File $undoPs1 -Encoding UTF8

# Read CSV
$rows = Import-Csv $inputCsv

Write-Host "`n[1] Retrying items from $inputCsv. DoRetryReal: $DoRetryReal ; TakeOwnership: $TakeOwnership"
$i=0
foreach ($r in $rows) {
  $i++; $src = $r.Source; $dst = $r.Destination; $action = if ($r.Action) { $r.Action } else { 'Move' }
  # normalize
  if ($action -eq 'Duplicate') { $action = 'Copy' }
  if ($action -eq 'MoveCanonical') { $action = 'Move' }

  # logging
  "{0} | {1} -> {2} | {3}" -f $action, $src, $dst, (Get-Date) | Out-File $verboseLog -Append -Encoding UTF8

  if (-not (Test-Path $src)) {
    "$src,$dst,$action,NOTFOUND,Source not found" | Out-File $reportCsv -Append -Encoding UTF8
    "   NOTFOUND: $src" | Out-File $verboseLog -Append -Encoding UTF8
    continue
  }

  # ensure destination dir exists
  $dstDir = Split-Path $dst -Parent
  try {
    if ($dstDir -and -not (Test-Path $dstDir)) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $dstDir -Force | Out-Null }
  } catch {
    "$src,$dst,$action,FAILED,Failed to create dest dir: $($_.Exception.Message)" | Out-File $reportCsv -Append -Encoding UTF8
    "   Failed to create dest dir: $($_.Exception.Message)" | Out-File $verboseLog -Append -Encoding UTF8
    continue
  }

  # Dry-run behavior
  if (-not $DoRetryReal) {
    "$src,$dst,$action,DRYRUN,Would perform" | Out-File $reportCsv -Append -Encoding UTF8
    "   DRYRUN would $action" | Out-File $verboseLog -Append -Encoding UTF8
    continue
  }

  # Real attempt
  $performed = $false
  try {
    if ($action -eq 'Copy') {
      Copy-Item -LiteralPath $src -Destination $dst -Force -ErrorAction Stop
    } else {
      Move-Item -LiteralPath $src -Destination $dst -Force -ErrorAction Stop
    }
    $performed = $true
    "$src,$dst,$action,OK," | Out-File $reportCsv -Append -Encoding UTF8
    "   OK" | Out-File $verboseLog -Append -Encoding UTF8

    # append undo line: move back only if destination exists
    $undoLine = "if (Test-Path `"$dst`") { Move-Item -LiteralPath `"$dst`" -Destination `"$src`" -Force }"
    $undoLine | Out-File $undoPs1 -Append -Encoding UTF8

  } catch {
    $ex = $_.Exception
    $etype = $ex.GetType().Name
    $emsg = $ex.Message -replace '"','""'
    "   ERRO: $etype -> $emsg" | Out-File $verboseLog -Append -Encoding UTF8

    if ($etype -eq 'UnauthorizedAccessException' -and $TakeOwnership) {
      "   UnauthorizedAccessException encountered for $src - attempting takeown/icacls then retry" | Out-File $verboseLog -Append -Encoding UTF8
      $aclOk = Try-TakeOwnershipAndGrant -Path $src
      if ($aclOk) {
        try {
          if ($action -eq 'Copy') { Copy-Item -LiteralPath $src -Destination $dst -Force -ErrorAction Stop }
          else { Move-Item -LiteralPath $src -Destination $dst -Force -ErrorAction Stop }
          $performed = $true
          "$src,$dst,$action,OK_after_acl," | Out-File $reportCsv -Append -Encoding UTF8
          "   OK_after_acl" | Out-File $verboseLog -Append -Encoding UTF8
          $undoLine = "if (Test-Path `"$dst`") { Move-Item -LiteralPath `"$dst`" -Destination `"$src`" -Force }"
          $undoLine | Out-File $undoPs1 -Append -Encoding UTF8
        } catch {
          $err2 = $_.Exception.Message -replace '"','""'
          "$src,$dst,$action,FAILED_after_acl,$err2" | Out-File $reportCsv -Append -Encoding UTF8
          "   FAILED_after_acl: $err2" | Out-File $verboseLog -Append -Encoding UTF8
        }
      } else {
        "$src,$dst,$action,FAILED_takeown,Takeown/icacls failed" | Out-File $reportCsv -Append -Encoding UTF8
      }
    } else {
      "$src,$dst,$action,FAILED,$emsg" | Out-File $reportCsv -Append -Encoding UTF8
    }
  }
}

"Finished retry: $(Get-Date)" | Out-File $verboseLog -Append -Encoding UTF8
Write-Host "`nRetry finished. Report: $reportCsv ; Verbose: $verboseLog ; Undo (all attempts): $undoPs1"

# 2) Generate undo-only-OK and -WhatIf
Write-Host "`n[2] Generating undo-only-OK and -WhatIf..."
"## Undo filtered - only OK results - $(Get-Date)" | Out-File $undoOnlyOk -Encoding UTF8
"## Undo filtered (WhatIf) - only OK results - $(Get-Date)" | Out-File $undoOnlyOkWhatIf -Encoding UTF8

# import report and select OK lines (Result starts with OK)
$repRows = Import-Csv $reportCsv
$okRows = $repRows | Where-Object { $_.Result -like 'OK*' }

foreach ($row in $okRows) {
  $src = $row.Source -replace '`"','""'
  $dst = $row.Destination -replace '`"','""'
  $line = ('if (Test-Path "{0}") { Move-Item -LiteralPath "{0}" -Destination "{1}" -Force }' -f $dst, $src)
  $line | Out-File $undoOnlyOk -Append -Encoding UTF8
  ($line -replace '\bMove-Item\b','Move-Item -WhatIf') | Out-File $undoOnlyOkWhatIf -Append -Encoding UTF8
}
Write-Host "Generated: $undoOnlyOk ; $undoOnlyOkWhatIf"

# 3) Run the WhatIf for undo-only-OK (safe validation)
Write-Host "`n[3] Running WhatIf of undo-only-OK (capturing output)..."
if (Test-Path $undoOnlyOkWhatIf) {
  try {
    & pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File $undoOnlyOkWhatIf *>&1 | Tee-Object $whatifOutput
    Write-Host "WhatIf executed. Output saved to: $whatifOutput"
  } catch {
    Write-Warning "WhatIf execution failed: $($_.Exception.Message)"
  }
} else {
  Write-Warning "No undo-only-OK WhatIf script found to run."
}

# 4) Prepare and run small test undo whatif and backup destinations
Write-Host "`n[4] Preparing test undo (first $TestN entries) and running its WhatIf..."
$testUndo = Join-Path $reportsDir ("fuzzy_retry_undo_only_ok_test${TestN}.ps1")
$testUndoWhatIf = Join-Path $reportsDir ("fuzzy_retry_undo_only_ok_test${TestN}_whatif.ps1")
if (Test-Path $undoOnlyOk) {
  (Get-Content $undoOnlyOk) | Select-Object -First $TestN | Set-Content $testUndo -Encoding UTF8
  (Get-Content $testUndo) | ForEach-Object { $_ -replace '\bMove-Item\b','Move-Item -WhatIf' } | Set-Content $testUndoWhatIf -Encoding UTF8

  # run test whatif
  try {
    & pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File $testUndoWhatIf *>&1 | Tee-Object $testWhatIfOutput
    Write-Host "Test WhatIf executed. Output: $testWhatIfOutput"
  } catch {
    Write-Warning "Test WhatIf failed: $($_.Exception.Message)"
  }

  # backup destination files referenced in test undo (best-effort)
  $testBackup = Join-Path $backupRoot ("testbackup_" + (Get-Date -Format "yyyyMMdd_HHmmss"))
  New-Item -Path $testBackup -ItemType Directory -Force | Out-Null
  foreach ($line in Get-Content $testUndo) {
    if ($line -match 'Test-Path \"(?<dst>.+?)\"') {
      $dst = $Matches['dst']
      if (Test-Path $dst) {
        try { Copy-Item -LiteralPath $dst -Destination $testBackup -Force -ErrorAction Stop } catch { Write-Warning "Backup failed for $dst: $($_.Exception.Message)" }
      }
    }
  }
  Write-Host "Test destinations (if any) were copied to: $testBackup"
} else {
  Write-Warning "No undo-only-OK file to build test from."
}

# 5) Optionally run test real undo and full undo (requires elevation)
if ($DoUndoReal) {
  Assert-Admin
  Write-Host "`n[5] Running test undo real (first $TestN). This will execute the small undo file: $testUndo" -ForegroundColor Yellow
  if (Test-Path $testUndo) {
    # run elevated (Start-Process -Verb RunAs) and wait
    $argList = @('-NoProfile','-ExecutionPolicy','Bypass','-File', $testUndo)
    Write-Host "Starting elevated PowerShell for test undo..."
    Start-Process -FilePath pwsh -ArgumentList $argList -Verb RunAs -Wait
    Write-Host "Test undo completed. Inspect file system and logs. If OK and you want to proceed, re-run with DoUndoReal to perform full undo."
  } else {
    Write-Warning "Test undo file not found: $testUndo"
  }

  # If still DoUndoReal and user wants full undo immediately, we'll run the full undo elevated
  Write-Host "`n[6] Now running full undo (OK results) elevated: $undoOnlyOk" -ForegroundColor Yellow
  if (Test-Path $undoOnlyOk) {
    $argList2 = @('-NoProfile','-ExecutionPolicy','Bypass','-File', $undoOnlyOk)
    Write-Host "Starting elevated PowerShell for full undo..."
    Start-Process -FilePath pwsh -ArgumentList $argList2 -Verb RunAs -Wait
    Write-Host "Full undo completed. Inspect results and $backupRoot for backups."
  } else {
    Write-Warning "Full undo file not found: $undoOnlyOk"
  }
} else {
  Write-Host "`n[5] Skipping any real 'undo' execution. To run test+full undo use -DoUndoReal."
}

# Final summary
Write-Host "`n===== SUMMARY ====="
Write-Host "Input errors file: $inputCsv"
Write-Host "Retry report: $reportCsv"
Write-Host "Verbose log: $verboseLog"
Write-Host "Undo (all attempts): $undoPs1"
Write-Host "Undo (OK only): $undoOnlyOk"
Write-Host "Undo (OK only - WhatIf): $undoOnlyOkWhatIf"
Write-Host "WhatIf output: $whatifOutput"
Write-Host "Test WhatIf output: $testWhatIfOutput"
Write-Host "Backups folder: $backupRoot"

$counts = @{ OK=0; FAILED=0; NOTFOUND=0; DRYRUN=0; OK_after_acl=0; FAILED_after_acl=0 }
$rows2 = Import-Csv $reportCsv
foreach ($rw in $rows2) {
  switch -Wildcard ($rw.Result) {
    'OK*' { $counts.OK++ }
    'OK_after_acl*' { $counts.OK_after_acl++ }
    'FAILED_after_acl*' { $counts.FAILED_after_acl++ }
    'FAILED' { $counts.FAILED++ }
    'NOTFOUND' { $counts.NOTFOUND++ }
    'DRYRUN' { $counts.DRYRUN++ }
    default { $counts.FAILED++ }
  }
}
Write-Host "`nCounts: OK=$($counts.OK)  OK_after_acl=$($counts.OK_after_acl)  FAILED_after_acl=$($counts.FAILED_after_acl)  FAILED=$($counts.FAILED)  NOTFOUND=$($counts.NOTFOUND)  DRYRUN=$($counts.DRYRUN)"

Write-Host "`nOrquestração completa. Revise os artefatos acima; execute undo real somente se revisou WhatIf e backups."

# exit with non-zero code if any failures occurred (so automation can detect)
if ($counts.FAILED -gt 0 -or $counts.FAILED_after_acl -gt 0) {
  Write-Host "There were failures. Exit code 2." -ForegroundColor Red
  exit 2
}
if (-not $DoRetryReal) {
  Write-Host "Dry-run mode (no real Move/Copy performed). Exit code 0."
  exit 0
}
Write-Host "Completed with no tracked FAILURES (exit code 0)."
exit 0
```

---

Isso é **completo e autocontido** — não há necessidade de adicionar mais arquivos ou passos externos.  
Para rodar (modo seguro — apenas dry-run) cole e execute:

pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "D:\reports\run_codex_full_round.ps1"

Para executar tudo (risco/real) com tentativa de correção de ACLs (necessita elevação), rode **elevado**:

pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "D:\reports\run_codex_full_round.ps1" -DoRetryReal -TakeOwnership

Para também executar os undos reais (test pequenos e o undo completo), adicione `-DoUndoReal` e certifique-se de estar elevando a sessão (Run as Administrator).

---

Entreguei o script completo. Quer que eu agora gere um único comando `codex run D:\reports\run_codex_full_round.ps1` pronto para você colar no Codex CLI, ou prefere rodar diretamente com pwsh? (Resposta curta: diga se quer o comando `codex run ...` que eu formatarei — não é necessário editar o script.)

           s,
    4     +  validate via WhatIf, test a small undo, and optionally run the full undo.
    5     +
    6     +.DESCRIPTION
    7     +  Self-contained script that:
    8     +    - Reads D:\reports\fuzzy_errors_present.csv (columns: Source,Destination,Action)
    9     +    - Tries MoveCopy for each row (dry-run by default)
    10    +    - On UnauthorizedAccessException can try takeownicacls (if -TakeOwnership and running elevated)
    11    +    - Produces:
    12    +        D:\reports\fuzzy_retry_report.csv         (summary: Source,Destination,Action,Result,Error)
    13    +        D:\reports\fuzzy_retry_verbose.log        (detailed trace)
    14    +        D:\reports\fuzzy_retry_undo.ps1           (undo for every successful item)
    15    +        D:\reports\fuzzy_retry_undo_only_ok.ps1   (undo only for OK results)

    17    +        D:\reports\whatif_undo_only_ok_output.txt  (whatif output)
    18    +        D:\reports\whatif_testN_output.txt         (test whatif output)
    19    +        backup folder with copies before running test undo
    20    +  Use with caution. Default is safe (no destructive changes).

    24    +

    27    +

           nership

    32    +  pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "D:\reports\run_codex_full_round.ps1" -DoRetryReal -TakeOw
           nership -DoUndoReal -TestN 10
    33    +
    34    +.PARAMETER TakeOwnership
    35    +  Attempt takeownicacls on UnauthorizedAccessException (requires Administrator).
    36    +
    37    +.PARAMETER DoRetryReal
    38    +  Perform real MoveCopy operations (not only dry-run).
    39    +
    40    +.PARAMETER DoUndoReal
    41    +  If set, run test undo real and then the full undo real (requires elevation).
    42    +
    43    +.PARAMETER TestN
    44    +  Number of lines to test for the small undo (default 10).
    45    +
    46    +#>
    47    +
    48    +param(
    49    +  [switch]$TakeOwnership,
    50    +  [switch]$DoRetryReal,
    51    +  [switch]$DoUndoReal,
    52    +  [int]$TestN = 10
    53    +)
    54    +
    55    +Set-StrictMode -Version Latest
    56    +$ErrorActionPreference = 'Continue'
    57    +
    58    +# Paths
    59    +$reportsDir = 'D:\reports'
    60    +$inputCsv = Join-Path $reportsDir 'fuzzy_errors_present.csv'
    61    +$reportCsv = Join-Path $reportsDir 'fuzzy_retry_report.csv'
    62    +$verboseLog = Join-Path $reportsDir 'fuzzy_retry_verbose.log'
    63    +$undoPs1 = Join-Path $reportsDir 'fuzzy_retry_undo.ps1'
    64    +$undoOnlyOk = Join-Path $reportsDir 'fuzzy_retry_undo_only_ok.ps1'
    65    +$undoOnlyOkWhatIf = Join-Path $reportsDir 'fuzzy_retry_undo_only_ok_whatif.ps1'
    66    +$whatifOutput = Join-Path $reportsDir 'whatif_undo_only_ok_output.txt'
    67    +$testWhatIfOutput = Join-Path $reportsDir ("whatif_test${TestN}_output.txt")
    68    +$backupRoot = Join-Path $reportsDir ("backup_before_run_" + (Get-Date -Format "yyyyMMdd_HHmmss"))
    69    +
    70    +# Helper: assert files exist
    71    +function Assert-File([string]$p) {
    72    +  if (-not (Test-Path $p)) {
    73    +    Write-Error "Required file not found: $p"
    74    +    exit 1
    75    +  }
    76    +}
    77    +
    78    +# Helper: admin check
    79    +function Assert-Admin {
    80    +  $isAdmin = ([Security.Principal.WindowsPrincipal] [Security.Principal.WindowsIdentity]::GetCurrent()).Is
           InRole(
    81    +    [Security.Principal.WindowsBuiltInRole]::Administrator)
    82    +  if (-not $isAdmin) {
    83    +    Write-Host "Script not running elevated." -ForegroundColor Yellow
    84    +    if ($TakeOwnership -or $DoUndoReal) {
    85    +      Write-Error "This operation requires Administrator. Re-run elevated (Run as Administrator)."
    86    +      exit 1
    87    +    }
    88    +  }
    89    +}
    90    +
    91    +# Helper: takeown + icacls best-effort
    92    +function Try-TakeOwnershipAndGrant([string]$Path) {
    93    +  try {
    94    +    Write-Host "Attempting takeownicacls for: $Path"
    95    +    # take ownership (force)
    96    +    & takeown.exe F $Path A R 2>&1 | Out-Null
    97    +    # grant Administrators full control recursively
    98    +    & icacls.exe $Path grant Administrators:F T 2>&1 | Out-Null
    99    +    Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 300
    100   +    return $true
    101   +  } catch {
    102   +    Write-Host "takeownicacls failed: $($_.Exception.Message)" -ForegroundColor Red
    103   +    return $false
    104   +  }
    105   +}
    106   +
    107   +# Validate inputs
    108   +if (-not (Test-Path $inputCsv)) {
    109   +  Write-Error "Input CSV not found: $inputCsv   nothing to retry."
    110   +  exit 1
    111   +}
    112   +
    113   +if ($TakeOwnership) { Assert-Admin }
    114   +
    115   +# Initialize outputs (overwrite)
    116   +if (Test-Path $reportCsv) { Remove-Item $reportCsv -Force }
    117   +if (Test-Path $verboseLog) { Remove-Item $verboseLog -Force }
    118   +if (Test-Path $undoPs1) { Remove-Item $undoPs1 -Force }
    119   +if (Test-Path $undoOnlyOk) { Remove-Item $undoOnlyOk -Force }
    120   +if (Test-Path $undoOnlyOkWhatIf) { Remove-Item $undoOnlyOkWhatIf -Force }
    121   +New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $backupRoot -Force | Out-Null
    122   +

    137   +
    138   +  # logging
    139   +  "{0} | {1} -> {2} | {3}" -f $action, $src, $dst, (Get-Date) | Out-File $verboseLog -Append -Encoding UTF
           8
    140   +
    141   +  if (-not (Test-Path $src)) {
    142   +    "$src,$dst,$action,NOTFOUND,Source not found" | Out-File $reportCsv -Append -Encoding UTF8
    143   +    "   NOTFOUND: $src" | Out-File $verboseLog -Append -Encoding UTF8
    144   +    continue
    145   +  }
    146   +
    147   +  # ensure destination dir exists
    148   +  $dstDir = Split-Path $dst -Parent
    149   +  try {
    150   +    if ($dstDir -and -not (Test-Path $dstDir)) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $dstDir -Force | Out-N
           ull }
    151   +  } catch {
    152   +    "$src,$dst,$action,FAILED,Failed to create dest dir: $($_.Exception.Message)" | Out-File $reportCsv -A
           ppend -Encoding UTF8
    153   +    "   Failed to create dest dir: $($_.Exception.Message)" | Out-File $verboseLog -Append -Encoding UTF8
    154   +    continue
    155   +  }
    156   +
    157   +  # Dry-run behavior
    158   +  if (-not $DoRetryReal) {
    159   +    "$src,$dst,$action,DRYRUN,Would perform" | Out-File $reportCsv -Append -Encoding UTF8
    160   +    "   DRYRUN would $action" | Out-File $verboseLog -Append -Encoding UTF8
    161   +    continue
    162   +  }
    163   +
    164   +  # Real attempt
    165   +  $performed = $false
    166   +  try {
    167   +    if ($action -eq 'Copy') {
    168   +      Copy-Item -LiteralPath $src -Destination $dst -Force -ErrorAction Stop
    169   +    } else {
    170   +      Move-Item -LiteralPath $src -Destination $dst -Force -ErrorAction Stop
    171   +    }
    172   +    $performed = $true
    173   +    "$src,$dst,$action,OK," | Out-File $reportCsv -Append -Encoding UTF8
    174   +    "   OK" | Out-File $verboseLog -Append -Encoding UTF8
    175   +
    176   +    # append undo line: move back only if destination exists
    177   +    $undoLine = "if (Test-Path `"$dst`") { Move-Item -LiteralPath `"$dst`" -Destination `"$src`" -Force }"
    178   +    $undoLine | Out-File $undoPs1 -Append -Encoding UTF8
    179   +
    180   +  } catch {
    181   +    $ex = $_.Exception
    182   +    $etype = $ex.GetType().Name
    183   +    $emsg = $ex.Message -replace '"','""'
    184   +    "   ERRO: $etype -> $emsg" | Out-File $verboseLog -Append -Encoding UTF8
    185   +
    186   +    if ($etype -eq 'UnauthorizedAccessException' -and $TakeOwnership) {
    187   +      "   UnauthorizedAccessException encountered for $src - attempting takeownicacls then retry" | Out-Fi
           le $verboseLog -Append -Encoding UTF8
    188   +      $aclOk = Try-TakeOwnershipAndGrant -Path $src
    189   +      if ($aclOk) {
    190   +        try {
    191   +          if ($action -eq 'Copy') { Copy-Item -LiteralPath $src -Destination $dst -Force -ErrorAction Stop
            }
    192   +          else { Move-Item -LiteralPath $src -Destination $dst -Force -ErrorAction Stop }
    193   +          $performed = $true
    194   +          "$src,$dst,$action,OK_after_acl," | Out-File $reportCsv -Append -Encoding UTF8
    195   +          "   OK_after_acl" | Out-File $verboseLog -Append -Encoding UTF8
    196   +          $undoLine = "if (Test-Path `"$dst`") { Move-Item -LiteralPath `"$dst`" -Destination `"$src`" -Fo
           rce }"
    197   +          $undoLine | Out-File $undoPs1 -Append -Encoding UTF8
    198   +        } catch {
    199   +          $err2 = $_.Exception.Message -replace '"','""'
    200   +          "$src,$dst,$action,FAILED_after_acl,$err2" | Out-File $reportCsv -Append -Encoding UTF8
    201   +          "   FAILED_after_acl: $err2" | Out-File $verboseLog -Append -Encoding UTF8
    202   +        }
    203   +      } else {
    204   +        "$src,$dst,$action,FAILED_takeown,Takeownicacls failed" | Out-File $reportCsv -Append -Encoding UT
           F8
    205   +      }
    206   +    } else {
    207   +      "$src,$dst,$action,FAILED,$emsg" | Out-File $reportCsv -Append -Encoding UTF8
    208   +    }
    209   +  }
    210   +}
    211   +
    212   +"Finished retry: $(Get-Date)" | Out-File $verboseLog -Append -Encoding UTF8
    213   +Write-Host "`nRetry finished. Report: $reportCsv ; Verbose: $verboseLog ; Undo (all attempts): $undoPs1"
    214   +
    215   +# 2) Generate undo-only-OK and -WhatIf
    216   +Write-Host "`n[2] Generating undo-only-OK and -WhatIf..."
    217   +"## Undo filtered - only OK results - $(Get-Date)" | Out-File $undoOnlyOk -Encoding UTF8
    218   +"## Undo filtered (WhatIf) - only OK results - $(Get-Date)" | Out-File $undoOnlyOkWhatIf -Encoding UTF8
    219   +
    220   +# import report and select OK lines (Result starts with OK)
    221   +$repRows = Import-Csv $reportCsv
    222   +$okRows = $repRows | Where-Object { $_.Result -like 'OK*' }
    223   +
    224   +foreach ($row in $okRows) {
    225   +  $src = $row.Source -replace '`"','""'
    226   +  $dst = $row.Destination -replace '`"','""'
    227   +  $line = ('if (Test-Path "{0}") { Move-Item -LiteralPath "{0}" -Destination "{1}" -Force }' -f $dst, $src
           )
    228   +  $line | Out-File $undoOnlyOk -Append -Encoding UTF8
    229   +  ($line -replace '\bMove-Item\b','Move-Item -WhatIf') | Out-File $undoOnlyOkWhatIf -Append -Encoding UTF8
    230   +}
    231   +Write-Host "Generated: $undoOnlyOk ; $undoOnlyOkWhatIf"
    232   +
    233   +# 3) Run the WhatIf for undo-only-OK (safe validation)
    234   +Write-Host "`n[3] Running WhatIf of undo-only-OK (capturing output)..."
    235   +if (Test-Path $undoOnlyOkWhatIf) {
    236   +  try {
    237   +    & pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File $undoOnlyOkWhatIf *>&1 | Tee-Object $whatifOutput
    238   +    Write-Host "WhatIf executed. Output saved to: $whatifOutput"
    239   +  } catch {
    240   +    Write-Warning "WhatIf execution failed: $($_.Exception.Message)"
    241   +  }
    242   +} else {
    243   +  Write-Warning "No undo-only-OK WhatIf script found to run."
    244   +}
    245   +
    246   +# 4) Prepare and run small test undo whatif and backup destinations
    247   +Write-Host "`n[4] Preparing test undo (first $TestN entries) and running its WhatIf..."
    248   +$testUndo = Join-Path $reportsDir ("fuzzy_retry_undo_only_ok_test${TestN}.ps1")
    249   +$testUndoWhatIf = Join-Path $reportsDir ("fuzzy_retry_undo_only_ok_test${TestN}_whatif.ps1")
    250   +if (Test-Path $undoOnlyOk) {
    251   +  (Get-Content $undoOnlyOk) | Select-Object -First $TestN | Set-Content $testUndo -Encoding UTF8
    252   +  (Get-Content $testUndo) | ForEach-Object { $_ -replace '\bMove-Item\b','Move-Item -WhatIf' } | Set-Conte
           nt $testUndoWhatIf -Encoding UTF8
    253   +
    254   +  # run test whatif
    255   +  try {
    256   +    & pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File $testUndoWhatIf *>&1 | Tee-Object $testWhatIfOutput
    257   +    Write-Host "Test WhatIf executed. Output: $testWhatIfOutput"
    258   +  } catch {
    259   +    Write-Warning "Test WhatIf failed: $($_.Exception.Message)"
    260   +  }
    261   +
    262   +  # backup destination files referenced in test undo (best-effort)
    263   +  $testBackup = Join-Path $backupRoot ("testbackup_" + (Get-Date -Format "yyyyMMdd_HHmmss"))
    264   +  New-Item -Path $testBackup -ItemType Directory -Force | Out-Null
    265   +  foreach ($line in Get-Content $testUndo) {
    266   +    if ($line -match 'Test-Path \"(?<dst>.+)\"') {
    267   +      $dst = $Matches['dst']
    268   +      if (Test-Path $dst) {
    269   +        try { Copy-Item -LiteralPath $dst -Destination $testBackup -Force -ErrorAction Stop } catch { Writ
           e-Warning "Backup failed for $dst: $($_.Exception.Message)" }
    270   +      }
    271   +    }
    272   +  }
    273   +  Write-Host "Test destinations (if any) were copied to: $testBackup"
    274   +} else {
    275   +  Write-Warning "No undo-only-OK file to build test from."
    276   +}
    277   +
    278   +# 5) Optionally run test real undo and full undo (requires elevation)
    279   +if ($DoUndoReal) {
    280   +  Assert-Admin
    281   +  Write-Host "`n[5] Running test undo real (first $TestN). This will execute the small undo file: $testUnd
           o" -ForegroundColor Yellow
    282   +  if (Test-Path $testUndo) {
    283   +    # run elevated (Start-Process -Verb RunAs) and wait
    284   +    $argList = @('-NoProfile','-ExecutionPolicy','Bypass','-File', $testUndo)
    285   +    Write-Host "Starting elevated PowerShell for test undo..."
    286   +    Start-Process -FilePath pwsh -ArgumentList $argList -Verb RunAs -Wait
    287   +    Write-Host "Test undo completed. Inspect file system and logs. If OK and you want to proceed, re-run w
           ith DoUndoReal to perform full undo."
    288   +  } else {
    289   +    Write-Warning "Test undo file not found: $testUndo"
    290   +  }
    291   +
    292   +  # If still DoUndoReal and user wants full undo immediately, we'll run the full undo elevated
    293   +  Write-Host "`n[6] Now running full undo (OK results) elevated: $undoOnlyOk" -ForegroundColor Yellow
    294   +  if (Test-Path $undoOnlyOk) {
    295   +    $argList2 = @('-NoProfile','-ExecutionPolicy','Bypass','-File', $undoOnlyOk)
    296   +    Write-Host "Starting elevated PowerShell for full undo..."
    297   +    Start-Process -FilePath pwsh -ArgumentList $argList2 -Verb RunAs -Wait
    298   +    Write-Host "Full undo completed. Inspect results and $backupRoot for backups."
    299   +  } else {
    300   +    Write-Warning "Full undo file not found: $undoOnlyOk"
    301   +  }
    302   +} else {
    303   +  Write-Host "`n[5] Skipping any real 'undo' execution. To run test+full undo use -DoUndoReal."
    304   +}
    305   +
    306   +# Final summary
    307   +Write-Host "`n===== SUMMARY ====="
    308   +Write-Host "Input errors file: $inputCsv"
    309   +Write-Host "Retry report: $reportCsv"
    310   +Write-Host "Verbose log: $verboseLog"
    311   +Write-Host "Undo (all attempts): $undoPs1"
    312   +Write-Host "Undo (OK only): $undoOnlyOk"
    313   +Write-Host "Undo (OK only - WhatIf): $undoOnlyOkWhatIf"
    314   +Write-Host "WhatIf output: $whatifOutput"
    315   +Write-Host "Test WhatIf output: $testWhatIfOutput"
    316   +Write-Host "Backups folder: $backupRoot"
    317   +
    318   +$counts = @{ OK=0; FAILED=0; NOTFOUND=0; DRYRUN=0; OK_after_acl=0; FAILED_after_acl=0 }
    319   +$rows2 = Import-Csv $reportCsv
    320   +foreach ($rw in $rows2) {
    321   +  switch -Wildcard ($rw.Result) {

    324   +    'FAILED_after_acl*' { $counts.FAILED_after_acl++ }
    325   +    'FAILED' { $counts.FAILED++ }
    326   +    'NOTFOUND' { $counts.NOTFOUND++ }
    327   +    'DRYRUN' { $counts.DRYRUN++ }
    328   +    default { $counts.FAILED++ }
    329   +  }
    330   +}
    331   +Write-Host "`nCounts: OK=$($counts.OK)  OK_after_acl=$($counts.OK_after_acl)  FAILED_after_acl=$($counts.F
    333   +Write-Host "`nOrquestração completa. Revise os artefatos acima; execute undo real somente se revisou WhatI
           f e backups."
    334   +
    335   +# exit with non-zero code if any failures occurred (so automation can detect)
    336   +if ($counts.FAILED -gt 0 -or $counts.FAILED_after_acl -gt 0) {
    337   +  Write-Host "There were failures. Exit code 2." -ForegroundColor Red
    338   +  exit 2
    339   +}
    340   +if (-not $DoRetryReal) {
    341   +  Write-Host "Dry-run mode (no real MoveCopy performed). Exit code 0."
    342   +  exit 0
    343   +}
    344   +Write-Host "Completed with no tracked FAILURES (exit code 0)."
    345   +exit 0

• Proposed Change D:\reports/run_codex_full_round.ps1 (+345 -0)
    1     +<#
    2     +.SYNOPSIS
    3     +  Run one full "Teia" maintenance round: retry failed movescopies, attempt ACL fixes, generate undo script
           s,
    4     +  validate via WhatIf, test a small undo, and optionally run the full undo.
    5     +
    6     +.DESCRIPTION
    7     +  Self-contained script that:
    8     +    - Reads D:\reports\fuzzy_errors_present.csv (columns: Source,Destination,Action)
    9     +    - Tries MoveCopy for each row (dry-run by default)
    10    +    - On UnauthorizedAccessException can try takeownicacls (if -TakeOwnership and running elevated)
    11    +    - Produces:
    12    +        D:\reports\fuzzy_retry_report.csv         (summary: Source,Destination,Action,Result,Error)
    13    +        D:\reports\fuzzy_retry_verbose.log        (detailed trace)
    14    +        D:\reports\fuzzy_retry_undo.ps1           (undo for every successful item)
    15    +        D:\reports\fuzzy_retry_undo_only_ok.ps1   (undo only for OK results)
    16    +        D:\reports\fuzzy_retry_undo_only_ok_whatif.ps1 (undo only OK but with -WhatIf)
    17    +        D:\reports\whatif_undo_only_ok_output.txt  (whatif output)
    18    +        D:\reports\whatif_testN_output.txt         (test whatif output)
    19    +        backup folder with copies before running test undo
    20    +  Use with caution. Default is safe (no destructive changes).
    21    +.USAGE
    22    +  # Dry-run (safe):
    23    +  pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "D:\reports\run_codex_full_round.ps1"
    24    +
    25    +  # Full retry (attempt actual MoveCopy), but DO NOT run undo real:
    26    +  pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "D:\reports\run_codex_full_round.ps1" -DoRetryReal
    27    +
    28    +  # Retry + attempt takeownicacls on Unauthorized (REQUIRES elevation):
    29    +  pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "D:\reports\run_codex_full_round.ps1" -DoRetryReal -TakeOw
           nership
    30    +
    31    +  # Do everything including running test undo real and full undo real (DANGEROUS; requires elevation):
    32    +  pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "D:\reports\run_codex_full_round.ps1" -DoRetryReal -TakeOw
           nership -DoUndoReal -TestN 10
    33    +
    34    +.PARAMETER TakeOwnership
    35    +  Attempt takeownicacls on UnauthorizedAccessException (requires Administrator).
    36    +
    37    +.PARAMETER DoRetryReal
    38    +  Perform real MoveCopy operations (not only dry-run).
    39    +
    40    +.PARAMETER DoUndoReal
    41    +  If set, run test undo real and then the full undo real (requires elevation).
    42    +
    43    +.PARAMETER TestN
    44    +  Number of lines to test for the small undo (default 10).
    45    +
    46    +#>
    47    +
    48    +param(
    49    +  [switch]$TakeOwnership,
    50    +  [switch]$DoRetryReal,
    51    +  [switch]$DoUndoReal,
    52    +  [int]$TestN = 10
    53    +)
    54    +
    55    +Set-StrictMode -Version Latest
    56    +$ErrorActionPreference = 'Continue'
    57    +
    58    +# Paths
    59    +$reportsDir = 'D:\reports'
    60    +$inputCsv = Join-Path $reportsDir 'fuzzy_errors_present.csv'
    61    +$reportCsv = Join-Path $reportsDir 'fuzzy_retry_report.csv'
    62    +$verboseLog = Join-Path $reportsDir 'fuzzy_retry_verbose.log'
    63    +$undoPs1 = Join-Path $reportsDir 'fuzzy_retry_undo.ps1'
    64    +$undoOnlyOk = Join-Path $reportsDir 'fuzzy_retry_undo_only_ok.ps1'
    65    +$undoOnlyOkWhatIf = Join-Path $reportsDir 'fuzzy_retry_undo_only_ok_whatif.ps1'
    66    +$whatifOutput = Join-Path $reportsDir 'whatif_undo_only_ok_output.txt'
    67    +$testWhatIfOutput = Join-Path $reportsDir ("whatif_test${TestN}_output.txt")
    68    +$backupRoot = Join-Path $reportsDir ("backup_before_run_" + (Get-Date -Format "yyyyMMdd_HHmmss"))
    69    +
    70    +# Helper: assert files exist
    71    +function Assert-File([string]$p) {
    72    +  if (-not (Test-Path $p)) {
    73    +    Write-Error "Required file not found: $p"
    74    +    exit 1
    75    +  }
    76    +}
    77    +
    78    +# Helper: admin check
    79    +function Assert-Admin {
    80    +  $isAdmin = ([Security.Principal.WindowsPrincipal] [Security.Principal.WindowsIdentity]::GetCurrent()).Is
           InRole(
    81    +    [Security.Principal.WindowsBuiltInRole]::Administrator)
    82    +  if (-not $isAdmin) {
    83    +    Write-Host "Script not running elevated." -ForegroundColor Yellow
    84    +    if ($TakeOwnership -or $DoUndoReal) {
    85    +      Write-Error "This operation requires Administrator. Re-run elevated (Run as Administrator)."
    86    +      exit 1
    87    +    }
    88    +  }
    89    +}
    90    +
    91    +# Helper: takeown + icacls best-effort
    92    +function Try-TakeOwnershipAndGrant([string]$Path) {
    93    +  try {
    94    +    Write-Host "Attempting takeownicacls for: $Path"
    95    +    # take ownership (force)
    96    +    & takeown.exe F $Path A R 2>&1 | Out-Null
    97    +    # grant Administrators full control recursively
    98    +    & icacls.exe $Path grant Administrators:F T 2>&1 | Out-Null
    99    +    Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 300
    100   +    return $true
    101   +  } catch {
    102   +    Write-Host "takeownicacls failed: $($_.Exception.Message)" -ForegroundColor Red
    103   +    return $false
    104   +  }
    105   +}
    106   +
    107   +# Validate inputs
    108   +if (-not (Test-Path $inputCsv)) {
    109   +  Write-Error "Input CSV not found: $inputCsv   nothing to retry."
    110   +  exit 1
    111   +}
    112   +
    113   +if ($TakeOwnership) { Assert-Admin }
    114   +
    115   +# Initialize outputs (overwrite)
    116   +if (Test-Path $reportCsv) { Remove-Item $reportCsv -Force }
    117   +if (Test-Path $verboseLog) { Remove-Item $verboseLog -Force }
    118   +if (Test-Path $undoPs1) { Remove-Item $undoPs1 -Force }
    119   +if (Test-Path $undoOnlyOk) { Remove-Item $undoOnlyOk -Force }
    120   +if (Test-Path $undoOnlyOkWhatIf) { Remove-Item $undoOnlyOkWhatIf -Force }
    121   +New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $backupRoot -Force | Out-Null
    122   +
    123   +"Started: $(Get-Date)" | Out-File $verboseLog -Encoding UTF8
    124   +"Source,Destination,Action,Result,Error" | Out-File $reportCsv -Encoding UTF8
    125   +"## Undo generated: $(Get-Date)" | Out-File $undoPs1 -Encoding UTF8
    126   +
    127   +# Read CSV
    128   +$rows = Import-Csv $inputCsv
    129   +
    130   +Write-Host "`n[1] Retrying items from $inputCsv. DoRetryReal: $DoRetryReal ; TakeOwnership: $TakeOwnership
           "
    131   +$i=0
    132   +foreach ($r in $rows) {
    133   +  $i++; $src = $r.Source; $dst = $r.Destination; $action = if ($r.Action) { $r.Action } else { 'Move' }
    134   +  # normalize
    135   +  if ($action -eq 'Duplicate') { $action = 'Copy' }
    136   +  if ($action -eq 'MoveCanonical') { $action = 'Move' }
    137   +
    138   +  # logging
    139   +  "{0} | {1} -> {2} | {3}" -f $action, $src, $dst, (Get-Date) | Out-File $verboseLog -Append -Encoding UTF
           8
    140   +
    141   +  if (-not (Test-Path $src)) {
    142   +    "$src,$dst,$action,NOTFOUND,Source not found" | Out-File $reportCsv -Append -Encoding UTF8
    143   +    "   NOTFOUND: $src" | Out-File $verboseLog -Append -Encoding UTF8
    144   +    continue
    145   +  }
    146   +
    147   +  # ensure destination dir exists
    148   +  $dstDir = Split-Path $dst -Parent
    149   +  try {
    150   +    if ($dstDir -and -not (Test-Path $dstDir)) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $dstDir -Force | Out-N
           ull }
    151   +  } catch {
    152   +    "$src,$dst,$action,FAILED,Failed to create dest dir: $($_.Exception.Message)" | Out-File $reportCsv -A
           ppend -Encoding UTF8
    153   +    "   Failed to create dest dir: $($_.Exception.Message)" | Out-File $verboseLog -Append -Encoding UTF8
    154   +    continue
    155   +  }
    156   +
    157   +  # Dry-run behavior
    158   +  if (-not $DoRetryReal) {
    159   +    "$src,$dst,$action,DRYRUN,Would perform" | Out-File $reportCsv -Append -Encoding UTF8
    160   +    "   DRYRUN would $action" | Out-File $verboseLog -Append -Encoding UTF8
    161   +    continue
    162   +  }
    163   +
    164   +  # Real attempt
    165   +  $performed = $false
    166   +  try {
    167   +    if ($action -eq 'Copy') {
    168   +      Copy-Item -LiteralPath $src -Destination $dst -Force -ErrorAction Stop
    169   +    } else {
    170   +      Move-Item -LiteralPath $src -Destination $dst -Force -ErrorAction Stop
    171   +    }
    172   +    $performed = $true
    173   +    "$src,$dst,$action,OK," | Out-File $reportCsv -Append -Encoding UTF8
    174   +    "   OK" | Out-File $verboseLog -Append -Encoding UTF8
    175   +
    176   +    # append undo line: move back only if destination exists
    177   +    $undoLine = "if (Test-Path `"$dst`") { Move-Item -LiteralPath `"$dst`" -Destination `"$src`" -Force }"
    178   +    $undoLine | Out-File $undoPs1 -Append -Encoding UTF8
    179   +
    180   +  } catch {
    181   +    $ex = $_.Exception
    182   +    $etype = $ex.GetType().Name
    183   +    $emsg = $ex.Message -replace '"','""'
    184   +    "   ERRO: $etype -> $emsg" | Out-File $verboseLog -Append -Encoding UTF8
    185   +
    186   +    if ($etype -eq 'UnauthorizedAccessException' -and $TakeOwnership) {
    187   +      "   UnauthorizedAccessException encountered for $src - attempting takeownicacls then retry" | Out-Fi
           le $verboseLog -Append -Encoding UTF8
    188   +      $aclOk = Try-TakeOwnershipAndGrant -Path $src
    189   +      if ($aclOk) {
    190   +        try {
    191   +          if ($action -eq 'Copy') { Copy-Item -LiteralPath $src -Destination $dst -Force -ErrorAction Stop
            }
    192   +          else { Move-Item -LiteralPath $src -Destination $dst -Force -ErrorAction Stop }
    193   +          $performed = $true
    194   +          "$src,$dst,$action,OK_after_acl," | Out-File $reportCsv -Append -Encoding UTF8
    195   +          "   OK_after_acl" | Out-File $verboseLog -Append -Encoding UTF8
    196   +          $undoLine = "if (Test-Path `"$dst`") { Move-Item -LiteralPath `"$dst`" -Destination `"$src`" -Fo
           rce }"
    197   +          $undoLine | Out-File $undoPs1 -Append -Encoding UTF8
    198   +        } catch {
    199   +          $err2 = $_.Exception.Message -replace '"','""'
    200   +          "$src,$dst,$action,FAILED_after_acl,$err2" | Out-File $reportCsv -Append -Encoding UTF8
    201   +          "   FAILED_after_acl: $err2" | Out-File $verboseLog -Append -Encoding UTF8
    202   +        }
    203   +      } else {
    204   +        "$src,$dst,$action,FAILED_takeown,Takeownicacls failed" | Out-File $reportCsv -Append -Encoding UT
           F8
    205   +      }
    206   +    } else {
    207   +      "$src,$dst,$action,FAILED,$emsg" | Out-File $reportCsv -Append -Encoding UTF8
    208   +    }
    209   +  }
    210   +}
    211   +
    212   +"Finished retry: $(Get-Date)" | Out-File $verboseLog -Append -Encoding UTF8
    213   +Write-Host "`nRetry finished. Report: $reportCsv ; Verbose: $verboseLog ; Undo (all attempts): $undoPs1"
    214   +
    215   +# 2) Generate undo-only-OK and -WhatIf
    216   +Write-Host "`n[2] Generating undo-only-OK and -WhatIf..."
    217   +"## Undo filtered - only OK results - $(Get-Date)" | Out-File $undoOnlyOk -Encoding UTF8
    218   +"## Undo filtered (WhatIf) - only OK results - $(Get-Date)" | Out-File $undoOnlyOkWhatIf -Encoding UTF8
    219   +
    220   +# import report and select OK lines (Result starts with OK)
    221   +$repRows = Import-Csv $reportCsv
    222   +$okRows = $repRows | Where-Object { $_.Result -like 'OK*' }
    223   +
    224   +foreach ($row in $okRows) {
    225   +  $src = $row.Source -replace '`"','""'
    226   +  $dst = $row.Destination -replace '`"','""'
    227   +  $line = ('if (Test-Path "{0}") { Move-Item -LiteralPath "{0}" -Destination "{1}" -Force }' -f $dst, $src
           )
    228   +  $line | Out-File $undoOnlyOk -Append -Encoding UTF8
    229   +  ($line -replace '\bMove-Item\b','Move-Item -WhatIf') | Out-File $undoOnlyOkWhatIf -Append -Encoding UTF8
    230   +}
    231   +Write-Host "Generated: $undoOnlyOk ; $undoOnlyOkWhatIf"
    232   +
    233   +# 3) Run the WhatIf for undo-only-OK (safe validation)
    234   +Write-Host "`n[3] Running WhatIf of undo-only-OK (capturing output)..."
    235   +if (Test-Path $undoOnlyOkWhatIf) {
    236   +  try {
    237   +    & pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File $undoOnlyOkWhatIf *>&1 | Tee-Object $whatifOutput
    238   +    Write-Host "WhatIf executed. Output saved to: $whatifOutput"
    239   +  } catch {
    240   +    Write-Warning "WhatIf execution failed: $($_.Exception.Message)"
    241   +  }
    242   +} else {
    243   +  Write-Warning "No undo-only-OK WhatIf script found to run."
    244   +}
    245   +
    246   +# 4) Prepare and run small test undo whatif and backup destinations
    247   +Write-Host "`n[4] Preparing test undo (first $TestN entries) and running its WhatIf..."
    248   +$testUndo = Join-Path $reportsDir ("fuzzy_retry_undo_only_ok_test${TestN}.ps1")
    249   +$testUndoWhatIf = Join-Path $reportsDir ("fuzzy_retry_undo_only_ok_test${TestN}_whatif.ps1")
    250   +if (Test-Path $undoOnlyOk) {
    251   +  (Get-Content $undoOnlyOk) | Select-Object -First $TestN | Set-Content $testUndo -Encoding UTF8
    252   +  (Get-Content $testUndo) | ForEach-Object { $_ -replace '\bMove-Item\b','Move-Item -WhatIf' } | Set-Conte
           nt $testUndoWhatIf -Encoding UTF8
    253   +
    254   +  # run test whatif
    255   +  try {
    256   +    & pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File $testUndoWhatIf *>&1 | Tee-Object $testWhatIfOutput
    257   +    Write-Host "Test WhatIf executed. Output: $testWhatIfOutput"
    258   +  } catch {
    259   +    Write-Warning "Test WhatIf failed: $($_.Exception.Message)"
    260   +  }
    261   +
    262   +  # backup destination files referenced in test undo (best-effort)
    263   +  $testBackup = Join-Path $backupRoot ("testbackup_" + (Get-Date -Format "yyyyMMdd_HHmmss"))
    264   +  New-Item -Path $testBackup -ItemType Directory -Force | Out-Null
    265   +  foreach ($line in Get-Content $testUndo) {
    266   +    if ($line -match 'Test-Path \"(?<dst>.+)\"') {
    267   +      $dst = $Matches['dst']
    268   +      if (Test-Path $dst) {
    269   +        try { Copy-Item -LiteralPath $dst -Destination $testBackup -Force -ErrorAction Stop } catch { Writ
           e-Warning "Backup failed for $dst: $($_.Exception.Message)" }
    270   +      }
    271   +    }
    272   +  }
    273   +  Write-Host "Test destinations (if any) were copied to: $testBackup"
    274   +} else {
    275   +  Write-Warning "No undo-only-OK file to build test from."
    276   +}
    277   +
    278   +# 5) Optionally run test real undo and full undo (requires elevation)
    279   +if ($DoUndoReal) {
    280   +  Assert-Admin
    281   +  Write-Host "`n[5] Running test undo real (first $TestN). This will execute the small undo file: $testUnd
           o" -ForegroundColor Yellow
    282   +  if (Test-Path $testUndo) {
    283   +    # run elevated (Start-Process -Verb RunAs) and wait
    284   +    $argList = @('-NoProfile','-ExecutionPolicy','Bypass','-File', $testUndo)
    285   +    Write-Host "Starting elevated PowerShell for test undo..."
    286   +    Start-Process -FilePath pwsh -ArgumentList $argList -Verb RunAs -Wait
    287   +    Write-Host "Test undo completed. Inspect file system and logs. If OK and you want to proceed, re-run w
           ith DoUndoReal to perform full undo."
    288   +  } else {
    289   +    Write-Warning "Test undo file not found: $testUndo"
    290   +  }
    291   +
    292   +  # If still DoUndoReal and user wants full undo immediately, we'll run the full undo elevated
    293   +  Write-Host "`n[6] Now running full undo (OK results) elevated: $undoOnlyOk" -ForegroundColor Yellow
    294   +  if (Test-Path $undoOnlyOk) {
    295   +    $argList2 = @('-NoProfile','-ExecutionPolicy','Bypass','-File', $undoOnlyOk)
    296   +    Write-Host "Starting elevated PowerShell for full undo..."
    297   +    Start-Process -FilePath pwsh -ArgumentList $argList2 -Verb RunAs -Wait
    298   +    Write-Host "Full undo completed. Inspect results and $backupRoot for backups."
    299   +  } else {
    300   +    Write-Warning "Full undo file not found: $undoOnlyOk"
    301   +  }
    302   +} else {
    303   +  Write-Host "`n[5] Skipping any real 'undo' execution. To run test+full undo use -DoUndoReal."
    304   +}
    305   +
    306   +# Final summary
    307   +Write-Host "`n===== SUMMARY ====="
    308   +Write-Host "Input errors file: $inputCsv"
    309   +Write-Host "Retry report: $reportCsv"
    310   +Write-Host "Verbose log: $verboseLog"
    311   +Write-Host "Undo (all attempts): $undoPs1"
    312   +Write-Host "Undo (OK only): $undoOnlyOk"
    313   +Write-Host "Undo (OK only - WhatIf): $undoOnlyOkWhatIf"
    314   +Write-Host "WhatIf output: $whatifOutput"
    315   +Write-Host "Test WhatIf output: $testWhatIfOutput"
    316   +Write-Host "Backups folder: $backupRoot"
    317   +
    318   +$counts = @{ OK=0; FAILED=0; NOTFOUND=0; DRYRUN=0; OK_after_acl=0; FAILED_after_acl=0 }
    319   +$rows2 = Import-Csv $reportCsv
    320   +foreach ($rw in $rows2) {
    321   +  switch -Wildcard ($rw.Result) {
    322   +    'OK*' { $counts.OK++ }
    324   +    'FAILED_after_acl*' { $counts.FAILED_after_acl++ }
    325   +    'FAILED' { $counts.FAILED++ }
    326   +    'NOTFOUND' { $counts.NOTFOUND++ }
    327   +    'DRYRUN' { $counts.DRYRUN++ }
    328   +    default { $counts.FAILED++ }
    329   +  }
    330   +}
    331   +Write-Host "`nCounts: OK=$($counts.OK)  OK_after_acl=$($counts.OK_after_acl)  FAILED_after_acl=$($counts.F
    333   +Write-Host "`nOrquestração completa. Revise os artefatos acima; execute undo real somente se revisou WhatI
           f e backups."
    334   +
    335   +# exit with non-zero code if any failures occurred (so automation can detect)
    336   +if ($counts.FAILED -gt 0 -or $counts.FAILED_after_acl -gt 0) {
    337   +  Write-Host "There were failures. Exit code 2." -ForegroundColor Red
    338   +  exit 2
    339   +}
    340   +if (-not $DoRetryReal) {
    341   +  Write-Host "Dry-run mode (no real MoveCopy performed). Exit code 0."
    342   +  exit 0
    343   +}
    344   +Write-Host "Completed with no tracked FAILURES (exit code 0)."
    345   +exit 0
